summary: This week's strongest cross-platform opportunity is the portable neck fan, confirmed by a 511% Google search surge, dominance of Amazon's personal fans best seller list, and viral TikTok Shop heatwave content — a rare true three-platform alignment at peak summer heat. Kojic acid serum and magnesium supplements are the other two triple-platform winners, both riding ingredient-aware beauty searches, all-time-high Google volumes, and proven eight-figure TikTok GMV. Dropshippers should prioritize these three products immediately, as summer seasonal urgency and multi-channel demand signals suggest peak sell-through windows of just 4–6 weeks.
